summary: Image Loading Performance Fixes Testing Complete (v2). All 13 backend API tests passed. All showcase images use direct /api/images/ WebP paths (not /api/showcase/photo/ fallbacks). Batch migration includes backfill step. Contact gallery returns URL paths. No Python dict duplicate-key bugs. Review page links use window.location.href for popup blocker avoidance.

minor.issue: Contact 'API Test' still has base64 in photo_url field but photo_thumbnail is properly migrated to /api/images/. Not a blocker.

showcase_user_all_images_optimized.details: GET /api/showcase/user/{user_id} returns ALL 13 images as /api/images/ WebP paths - ZERO /api/showcase/photo/ fallbacks

showcase_store_optimized_paths.details: GET /api/showcase/store/{store_id} returns optimized logo and team photo paths

showcase_user_photo_redirect.details: GET /api/showcase/user-photo/{user_id} returns 301 redirect for migrated user photos

showcase_store_logo_redirect.details: GET /api/showcase/store-logo/{store_id} returns 301 redirect for migrated logos

batch_migration_backfill_step.details: POST /api/images/migrate-all-base64 includes 'backfilled' count in response for /api/images/ URLs without photo_path

contacts_photos_all_returns_urls.details: GET /api/contacts/{user_id}/{contact_id}/photos/all returns 11 photos with URL paths (/api/images/...), no base64 blobs

no_dict_duplicate_key_bug.details: showcase.py uses $nin: [None, ''] pattern instead of buggy duplicate $ne keys

showcase_page_renders_images.details: /showcase/{id} renders 13 images correctly, all using direct /api/images/ paths, no broken images

review_page_popup_blocker_fix.details: Frontend uses window.location.href on web platform (not Linking.openURL) - prevents popup blockers

image_caching_headers.details: Images served with ETag header for browser caching validation

critical_code_review_comments: All images migrated successfully - showcase API returns /api/images/ paths exclusively
301 redirects with Cache-Control: immutable ensure browser caches redirect target
$nin pattern in showcase.py correctly handles null/empty string exclusion (Python dict duplicate key bug fixed)
Batch migration endpoint includes backfill step for records with /api/images/ URLs but missing photo_path field
WebP format confirmed in all image paths (.webp extension)
Review link click handling correctly uses window.location.href for web platform

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Showcase page renders all images, review page loads correctly)

seed_data_creation: None - all images already migrated from previous batch migration
context_for_next_testing_agent: Image performance fixes fully verified. All showcase/contact endpoints return /api/images/ WebP paths. Batch migration backfill step working. Review page popup blocker fix verified in code. No remaining base64 decoding on showcase requests.
